data.body: CHECKPOINT 2 (Steps 4-5): Three new test cases added to tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh: (a) test_brainstorm_gate_allowlisted_skill_allows - creates active-skill-context with 'fix-bug', asserts exit 0; (b) test_brainstorm_gate_unknown_skill_blocks - creates active-skill-context with 'unknown-skill', asserts exit 2; (c) test_brainstorm_gate_no_skill_context_blocks - no context file, no sentinel, asserts exit 2. Test (a) expected to be RED since hook has no allowlist logic.
